creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Tag your besties and bring them to these beautiful outdoor lounges this winter in Dubai!

🏙️ Level 43 Sky Lounge
📍 Four Points by Sheraton, Sheikh Zayed Road
🕑 2 PM to 3 AM
🤩 Chill sky bar with great views of Burj Khalifa, Museum of the Future, and SZR skyline 

🌅 Pure Sky Lounge
📍 Hilton Dubai, The Walk - JBR
🕔 5 PM to 1 AM
🤩 Rooftop bar and restaurant with amazing sunset, Ain Dubai and Palm Jumeirah views

🌇 Paros
📍 Taj Dubai, JLT
🕛 12 PM to 1 AM
🤩 Chic Mediterranean lounge with panoramic view of Dubai Marina skyline 

🌅 The Lounge
📍 Address Beach Resort
🕛 Open 24 hours
🤩 Elegant venue for light snacks and afternoon tea with excellent views of Bluewaters island

#ladyandhersweetescapes #Dubai #DubaiBlogger #UAEBlogger #myDubai #DubaiDestinations #VisitDubai
